step_rationale: Mediates ferritinophagy in myocardial injury; implicated in plaque rupture and cardiomyocyte apoptosis.
mechanism: p53 promotes ferritinophagy-driven iron metabolism during myocardial ischemia and contributes to cardiomyocyte death and plaque instability.

references.title: Multi-omics approach to personalised treatment: insights into thrombus-derived exosome regulation in cardiomyocyte ferritinophagy.
Dynamic Changes in Plasma Urotensin II and Its Correlation With Plaque Stability.
